---
title: "multinomial classification"
format: pdf
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(caret)
library(xgboost)
library(rpart)
library(rpart.plot)
library(dplyr)
library(smotefamily)


data <- read_parquet("../data/clean_data.parquet")
```

### Decision Tree (ALL)

```{r}
set.seed(0)

sample<- createDataPartition(data$race_simp, p=0.8, list=FALSE)
train<- data[sample,]
test<- data[-sample,]

tree<- rpart(race_simp ~ gross_rent + jwtrns + povpip + education + hupac + income_household + wkhp + esr + snap_benefits + health_insurance + cit, data=train, method="class", parms=list(split="Gini"), maxdepth=30)

```

```{r}
rpart.plot(tree, type=5)

pred.values<- predict(tree, test)
pred.values

test<- cbind(test, pred.values)
test$maxprob<- pmax(test$'Asian',test$'Black',test$'Hispanic',test$'Other',test$'White')

test$predclass<- ifelse(test$maxprob==test$'Asian', 'Asian',
  ifelse(test$maxprob==test$'Black','Black',
         ifelse(test$maxprob==test$'Hispanic','Hispanic',
                ifelse(test$maxprob==test$'Other','Other','White'))))

conf.mat <- table(Predicted=test$predclass, Actual=test$race_simp)

print(conf.mat)
```

### Decision Tree (Filtered based on citizen over 30)

```{r}
citizen_eda_30 <- data %>% 
  select(age, gross_rent, jwtrns, povpip, education, hupac, income_household, wkhp, esr, snap_benefits, health_insurance, cit, race_simp) %>% 
  filter(age > 30,
         esr != "Not in Labor Force")
  
set.seed(0)

sample<- createDataPartition(citizen_eda_30$race_simp, p=0.8, list=FALSE)
train<- citizen_eda_30[sample,]
test<- citizen_eda_30[-sample,]

x <- train %>% 
  select(-race_simp)

y <- train$race_simp

x <- model.matrix(~ . -1, data = x)

smote_data <- SMOTE(x, y, K = 5, dup_size = 0)

```

```{r}
prop.table(table(train$race_simp))
prop.table(table(test$race_simp))
```

```{r}
tree<- rpart(race_simp ~ gross_rent + jwtrns + povpip + education + hupac + income_household + wkhp + esr + snap_benefits + health_insurance + cit, data=train, method="class", parms=list(split="Entropy"), maxdepth=30)
```

```{r}
rpart.plot(tree, type=5)

pred.values<- predict(tree, test)
pred.values

test<- cbind(test, pred.values)
test$maxprob<- pmax(test$'Asian',test$'Black',test$'Hispanic',test$'Other',test$'White')

test$predclass<- ifelse(test$maxprob==test$'Asian', 'Asian',
  ifelse(test$maxprob==test$'Black','Black',
         ifelse(test$maxprob==test$'Hispanic','Hispanic',
                ifelse(test$maxprob==test$'Other','Other','White'))))

conf.mat <- table(Predicted=test$predclass, Actual=test$race_simp)

print(conf.mat)
```

### Boosting

```{r}
citizen_eda_30$target <- ifelse(citizen_eda_30$race_simp=="Asian", 0,
  ifelse(citizen_eda_30$race_simp=="Black", 1,
         ifelse(citizen_eda_30$race_simp=="Hispanic", 2,
                ifelse(citizen_eda_30$race_simp=="Other", 3, 4))))

citizen_eda_30 <- subset(citizen_eda_30, select=-race_simp)

set.seed(0)

sample<- createDataPartition(citizen_eda_30$target, p=0.8, list=FALSE)
train <- citizen_eda_30[sample, ]
test  <- citizen_eda_30[-sample, ]

train.x <- data.matrix(train[c('gross_rent', 'jwtrns', 'povpip', 'education', 'hupac', 'income_household', 'wkhp', 'esr', 'snap_benefits','health_insurance','cit')])
train.y <- train$target
test.x  <- data.matrix(test[c('gross_rent', 'jwtrns', 'povpip', 'education', 'hupac', 'income_household', 'wkhp', 'esr', 'snap_benefits','health_insurance','cit')])
test.y  <- test$target        
```

```{r}
dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(data = train.x, label = train.y)

xgb.mclass<- xgb.train(data=dtrain, params=list(num_class=5,
max_depth=6, eta=0.1, objective="multi:softprob"), nrounds=1000)

pred.prob <- predict(xgb.mclass, test.x)
pred.class <- max.col(pred.prob) - 1

test$predclass<- ifelse(pred.class==0, 'Asian',
  ifelse(pred.class==1,'Black',
         ifelse(pred.class==2,'Hispanic',
                ifelse(pred.class==3,'Other','White'))))

test$race_simp<- ifelse(pred.class==0, 'Asian',
  ifelse(pred.class==1,'Black',
         ifelse(pred.class==2,'Hispanic',
                ifelse(pred.class==3,'Other','White'))))

conf.mat <- table(Predicted=test$predclass, Actual=test$race_simp)

print(conf.mat)
```

```{r}
pred.prob <- predict(xgb.mclass, train.x)
pred.class <- max.col(pred.prob) - 1

train$predclass<- ifelse(pred.class==0, 'Asian',
  ifelse(pred.class==1,'Black',
         ifelse(pred.class==2,'Hispanic',
                ifelse(pred.class==3,'Other','White'))))

train$race_simp<- ifelse(pred.class==0, 'Asian',
  ifelse(pred.class==1,'Black',
         ifelse(pred.class==2,'Hispanic',
                ifelse(pred.class==3,'Other','White'))))

conf.mat <- table(Predicted=train$predclass, Actual=train$race_simp)

print(conf.mat)
```
